mapper.insert: INSERT INTO os_metric_raw ( instance_id, collected_at, metric_type, details, created_at ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{metricType}, #{details, typeHandler=com.dajanggan.global.config.JsonbTypeHandler}::jsonb, NOW() )

INSERT INTO os_metric_raw ( instance_id, collected_at, metric_type, details, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.instanceId}, #{item.collectedAt}, #{item.metricType}, #{item.details, typeHandler=com.dajanggan.global.config.JsonbTypeHandler}::jsonb, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT os_metric_raw_id, instance_id, collected_at, metric_type, details, created_at FROM os_metric_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND metric_type = #{metricType} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO os_metric_agg ( instance_id, collected_at, metric_type, avg_value, max_value, min_value, sample_count, created_at ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{metricType}, #{avgValue}, #{maxValue}, #{minValue}, #{sampleCount}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO os_metric_agg ( instance_id, collected_at, metric_type, avg_value, max_value, min_value, sample_count, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.instanceId}, #{item.collectedAt}, #{item.metricType}, #{item.avgValue}, #{item.maxValue}, #{item.minValue}, #{item.sampleCount}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT os_metric_agg_id, instance_id, collected_at, metric_type, avg_value, max_value, min_value, sample_count, created_at FROM os_metric_agg WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND metric_type = #{metricType} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at ASC
SELECT instance_id FROM monitor_instance ORDER BY instance_id ASC

SELECT collected_at, avg_value AS usage_percent, max_value, min_value, sample_count FROM os_metric_agg WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND metric_type = #{metricType} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at ASC
